Altaria

#0333 Swablu #0335 Zangoose
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Altaria is a Dragon/Flying type Pokémon introduced in Generation 3.

Altaria has a Mega Evolution, available in Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire and Pokémon Go.

Altaria Mega Altaria

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0334
Type Dragon Flying
Species Humming Pokémon
Height 1.1 m (3′07″)
Weight 20.6 kg (45.4 lbs)
Abilities 1. Natural Cure
Cloud Nine (hidden ability)
Local № 0122 (Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald)
0172 (Platinum)
0247 (Black 2/White 2)

0115 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 2 Sp. Def
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 172
Growth Rate Erratic

Breeding

Egg Groups Dragon, Flying
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Evolution chart

#0333
Swablu
Normal · Flying
(Level 35)
#0334
Altaria
Dragon · Flying

Altaria changes

  • In Generations 3-4, Altaria has a base experience yield of 188.
  • In Generations 3-7, Altaria has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Ruby ALTARIA dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this POKéMON makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.
Sapphire ALTARIA sings in a gorgeous soprano. Its wings are like cotton clouds. This POKéMON catches updrafts with its buoyant wings and soars way up into the wild blue yonder.
FireRed
LeafGreen		 If you hear a beautiful melody trilling deep among mountains far from people, it is ALTARIA’s humming.
Emerald It hums in a beautiful soprano voice. It flies among white clouds in the blue sky. It launches intensely hot fireballs from its mouth.
Diamond
Pearl		 It looks like a fluffy cloud when it is in flight. It hums with its soprano voice.
Platinum If it bonds with a person, it will gently envelop the friend with its soft wings, then hum.
HeartGold
SoulSilver		 It flies gracefully through the sky. Its melodic humming makes you feel like you’re in a dream.
Black
White		 If it bonds with a person, it will gently envelop the friend with its soft wings, then hum.
Black 2
White 2		 On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.
X It flies gracefully through the sky. Its melodic humming makes you feel like you’re in a dream.
Y On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.
Omega Ruby Altaria dances and wheels through the sky among billowing, cotton-like clouds. By singing melodies in its crystal-clear voice, this Pokémon makes its listeners experience dreamy wonderment.
Alpha Sapphire Altaria sings in a gorgeous soprano. Its wings are like cotton clouds. This Pokémon catches updrafts with its buoyant wings and soars way up into the wild blue yonder.
Sword As it flies in a calm and relaxed manner, Altaria performs a humming song that would enrapture any audience.
Shield This Pokémon has a kind disposition, but if it’s provoked, it will threaten opponents with shrill cries before attacking them without mercy.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It looks like a fluffy cloud when it is in flight. It hums with its soprano voice.
Scarlet If it bonds with a person, it will gently envelop the friend with its soft wings, then hum.
Violet On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.

Name origin

alto
high-pitched vocal sound
aria
an air or melody
